title: odontarrhena subspinosa
intro: Odontarrhena subspinosa, also known as Chinese toothwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Papaveraceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects, which can help to relieve pain and reduce fever. The health benefits of Odontarrhena subspinosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or made into capsules, or it can be tinctured to create a liquid extract that can be taken sublingually.
